answer_text: We predict the system will handle 50,000 concurrent users by Q3 with high confidence. Our deployment will follow a blue-green rollout strategy with automated rollback. The prediction is grounded in load test results that showed p99 latency under 200ms at 30,000 users.

confidence.response_text: We predict the system will handle 50,000 concurrent users by Q3 with high confidence. Our deployment will follow a blue-green rollout strategy with automated rollback. The prediction is grounded in load test results that showed p99 latency under 200ms at 30,000 users.

assumptions.description: Load test results at 30k users extrapolate linearly to 50k users
assumptions.falsification_condition: Staging load test at 50k users shows non-linear p99 latency degradation over 400ms

assumptions.description: Auto-scaling provisions new capacity within 60 seconds of a sudden traffic spike
assumptions.falsification_condition: Synthetic spike test exceeds 90 seconds before new instances become healthy

quality.response_text: We predict the system will handle 50,000 concurrent users by Q3 with high confidence. Our deployment will follow a blue-green rollout strategy with automated rollback. The prediction is grounded in load test results that showed p99 latency under 200ms at 30,000 users.
claims: System will handle 50,000 concurrent users by Q3

steps.description: Run 40k and 50k load tests in staging environment
Deploy to production with blue-green cutover
